description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet with a two-tiered structure, featuring a set of double doors on both the upper and lower sections. The cabinet is painted in a pale, almost pastel green or off-white color, with subtle panel detailing on the doors and sides that adds a touch of classic style. The central section between the upper and lower doors is recessed, creating an open shelf space for display or easy access storage. The cabinet stands on four short, sturdy legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The back and sides are solid, with the rear panel being completely plain and unadorned. No handles or knobs are visible on the doors, giving the cabinet a minimalist and clean appearance.
description: A tall, pale-colored cabinet with double doors on both the upper and lower sections, featuring a central open shelf and subtle panel detailing. The design is minimalist, with no visible handles and a clean, classic look.
description_view_0: Front view showing two sets of double doors, a central open shelf, and panel detailing.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the depth of the cabinet and the panel detailing on the side.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, unadorned back panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the side panel detailing and cabinet depth.
